name: Choco Lowfat Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Cup unsweetened cocoa powder (regular or European style)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Line muffin cups with paper baking cups.
3. In a medium bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Stir in the yogurt, milk, and vanilla extract just until combined. Do not beat.
5. Fill the muffin cups 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool slightly in the pans on wire racks.
8. Remove from the pans.
9. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the tops of the muffins, if desired.
10. Serve warm. Cover and store at room temperature, or freeze in an airtight container for longer storage.
